title: One Chunk Biomes
description: Turns world generation into a chunk-by-chunk biome mosaic. Every chunk gets its own biome, creating a chaotic patchwork world for survival and exploration.
body:
One Chunk Biomes turns world generation into a chunk-by-chunk biome mosaic.

  Instead of large biome regions stretching across huge parts of the map, this mod assigns biomes at chunk scale. Every
  chunk can become a different biome, which creates a chaotic patchwork world full of sharp biome borders, strange
  transitions, and unusual survival routes.

  This mod is meant for players who want a weird, experimental world generation style instead of normal biome layouts.

  ## Notes

  This mod changes biome generation for newly generated terrain. Existing chunks that were already generated before
  installing the mod will not be changed.
